name: ExtensionIngredient_Substance
title: R5: The substance that comprises this ingredient (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Ingredient.substance` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Ingredient.substance` 1..1 `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Ingredient.substance` 1..1 `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Ingredient.substance` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Ingredient` is not mapped.
Element `Ingredient.substance` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Denominator value
The quantity of substance in the unit of presentation
element.definition: The quantity of substance in the unit of presentation, or in the volume (or mass) of the single pharmaceutical product or manufactured item. Unit of presentation refers to the quantity that the item occurs in e.g. a strength per tablet size, perhaps 'per 20mg' (the size of the tablet). It is not generally normalized as a unitary unit, which would be 'per mg').

element.short: When strength is measured at a particular point or distance
element.definition: For when strength is measured at a particular point or distance. There are products where strength is measured at a particular point. For example, the strength of the ingredient in some inhalers is measured at a particular position relative to the point of aerosolization.
